title: T-010 — Cross-site dual-approval gate + 3 outbox events (§9.6, §11.3 V-MS-10/11, §12.3, D-MS-12)
prompt:
# T-010 — Cross-site dual-approval gate + 3 outbox events

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §9.6 approval cols, §11.3 V-MS-10 (from_site approval before shipped), V-MS-11 (to_site approval before received), §12.3 outbox events
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Enforce the dual cross-site approval gate at Server Action layer and emit the three outbox events per D-MS-12 / §12.3 lifecycle.

## Implementation contract
1. Server Action `transitionTransferOrder(id, nextState, actor)` in `packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/actions.ts`:
   - Load TO; compute isCrossSite via from_site_id != to_site_id.
   - For cross-site path: before allowing transition to 'shipped', assert from_site_manager_approval_id IS NOT NULL (V-MS-10) else throw `MissingFromSiteApproval`.
   - Before allowing 'received' for cross-site, assert to_site_manager_approval_id IS NOT NULL (V-MS-11) else throw `MissingToSiteApproval`.
   - Approval IDs reference audit_events.id rows produced via separate `approveTransferOrder({ side: 'from'|'to', actor })` Server Action — actor must have role site_manager at that side's site (RBAC enforced via withSiteContext).
2. Outbox emission (idempotent per outbox baseline T-111/T-112) via `packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/outbox.ts`:
   - On transition to 'shipped' → emit `transfer_order.shipped` payload {to_id, from_site_id, to_site_id, items_count, transfer_cost, cost_allocation_method, shipped_at, actor_user_id}.
   - On transition to 'in_transit' → emit `transfer_order.in_transit` payload {to_id, eta, current_location_optional}.
   - On transition to 'received' → emit `transfer_order.received` payload {to_id, received_at, lp_genealogy_ref, transfer_cost_settled}.
   - All emitted to warehouse_outbox_events with event_type='inter_site_transfer'.
3. Tests: V-MS-10/11 negative paths reject; positive paths emit exactly one row per event; idempotency proven by replay (same payload + same to_id + same event_type does not duplicate); cross-site role gate (site_manager-at-wrong-side cannot approve).

## Files
- packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/actions.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/outbox.ts [create]
- packages/domain/__tests__/transfer-orders/approval-gate.test.ts [create]
- packages/domain/__tests__/transfer-orders/outbox.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given a cross-site TO without from_site_manager_approval_id, when transitionTransferOrder('shipped') runs, then MissingFromSiteApproval is thrown (V-MS-10) and no state mutation occurs.
2. Given a cross-site TO without to_site_manager_approval_id, when transitionTransferOrder('received') runs, then MissingToSiteApproval is thrown (V-MS-11).
3. Given approveTransferOrder({side:'from', actor:user_X}) is called and user_X has role!=site_manager at from_site, then it throws UnauthorizedApproval.
4. Given a cross-site TO transitions 'shipped', when the action settles, then exactly one warehouse_outbox_events row exists with event_type='inter_site_transfer' and payload contains keys [to_id, from_site_id, to_site_id, transfer_cost, cost_allocation_method, shipped_at].
5. Given the same shipped transition is replayed (idempotency key reuse), when the second call runs, then no duplicate outbox row is created.
6. Given a same-site TO transitions 'shipped' (V-MS-12 path), when the action settles, then the outbox event is still emitted but the approval gate is bypassed (no from/to approval required for same-site).

## Test strategy
- RED: assert V-MS-10/11 negative + role gate + idempotency replay + same-site bypass + payload schema before actions.ts exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/domain test transfer-orders/approval-gate' + 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/domain test transfer-orders/outbox'.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow approval by anyone other than site_manager at that side's site — enforced via withSiteContext + role-check. The withSiteContext HOF establishes the session site context via app.current_site_id() (SECURITY DEFINER) which RLS policies on warehouse_outbox_events use as the site predicate.
- Do not emit outbox events outside the same tx as the state mutation — outbox baseline T-111 requires same-tx for at-least-once semantics.
- Do not bypass the approval gate via SECURITY DEFINER — actor identity must flow through.
- Do not duplicate outbox rows on replay — use idempotency key (to_id + target_state).
- Do not let outbox payload contain PII beyond actor_user_id — V-MS-13/§14.2 audit-only fields.

pipeline_inputs.description: Dual cross-site approval gate (from_site_manager_approval_id required before shipped per V-MS-10; to_site_manager_approval_id required before received per V-MS-11) + 3 outbox events (transfer_order.shipped, .in_transit, .received) emitted to warehouse_outbox_events with event_type='inter_site_transfer' tag.

Constraints: 1. Server Action `transitionTransferOrder(id, nextState, actor)` in `packages/domain/src/transfer-orders/actions.ts`: - Load TO; compute isCrossSite via from_site_id != to_site_id. - For cross-site path: before allowing transition to 'shipped', assert from_site_manager_approval_id IS NOT NULL (V-MS-10) else throw `MissingFromSiteApproval`. - Before. Do not implement P2 logistics-tracking courier API consumer.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Cross-mod dep to 00-foundation T-125 declared (withOrgContext + app.current_org_id() per F11 rule). withSiteContext HOF composes on top of T-125; approval gate uses withSiteContext per side.

acceptance_criteria: Given cross-site TO without from_site_manager_approval_id, when transitionTransferOrder('shipped') runs, then MissingFromSiteApproval thrown (V-MS-10); no state mutation; AND given cross-site TO without to_site_manager_approval_id when transitionTransferOrder('received') runs then ManagerApprovalRequired thrown.
Given approveTransferOrder({side:'from', actor:user_X}) and user_X has role!=site_manager at from_site, then UnauthorizedApproval thrown.

Given cross-site TO transitions 'shipped', when settled, then exactly one warehouse_outbox_events row with event_type='inter_site_transfer' and payload keys [to_id, from_site_id, to_site_id, transfer_cost, cost_allocation_method, shipped_at]; AND given same shipped transition replayed (idempotency key reuse) when second call runs then no duplicate outbox row inserted.
Given same-site TO transitions 'shipped' (V-MS-12 path), when settled, then outbox emitted but approval gate bypassed.
test_strategy: RED: assert V-MS-10/11 negative + role gate + idempotency + same-site bypass + payload schema before actions.ts exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow approval by anyone other than site_manager at that side's site.
Do not emit outbox outside the same tx — T-111 at-least-once semantics.
Do not bypass approval gate via SECURITY DEFINER — actor flows through.
Do not duplicate outbox on replay — idempotency key (to_id + target_state).
Do not put PII in payload beyond actor_user_id.
